local-main-codex.description: The current interactive Codex session. Use for Mission Control and M001 until aisw providers are configured.

codex-cheap-placeholder.command_template: bash -lc 'eval "$(aisw context use {aisw_context} --emit-env)"; codex exec --json --sandbox workspace-write --cd {worktree} "$(cat {prompt_file})" > {run_dir}/events.jsonl 2> {run_dir}/stderr.log'
codex-cheap-placeholder.description: Enable after M001 inspects aisw contexts.

claude-medium-placeholder.command_template: bash -lc 'eval "$(aisw context use {aisw_context} --emit-env)"; cd {worktree}; claude -p --output-format stream-json --permission-mode acceptEdits "$(cat {prompt_file})" > {run_dir}/events.jsonl 2> {run_dir}/stderr.log'
claude-medium-placeholder.description: Enable after M001 inspects aisw contexts.
